title: ASR Outdoor 550 Paracord Boot Laces for Shoes and Hiking Boots (Many Colors)

ASR Outdoor TraversaLace 550 Paracord Survival Laces for Shoes and Hiking Boots

Meet your forever laces (okay, maybe your almost-forever laces): the ASR Outdoor TraversaLace 550 Paracord Survival Laces for Shoes and Hiking Boots. Constructed from a seven-strand nylon inner core (kern) and exterior nylon jacket (mantle), the paracord survival laces are the ones you’ll want to reach down for and tie up when preparing for your next outdoor adventure expedition or work day. Made in the USA, these survival hiking boot laces are highly abrasion, chemical, corrosion, mold, wear, tear and UV resistant, amounting to an incredibly strong, durable and reliable product, sure to outlast any other shoe or boot laces that you’re currently using.

Here are the specs you’ll want to note: - Made in USA - Sold as a pair (or set of two laces) - 4.2mm metal aglet (included) - 500LB (pound) breaking point (or 249 kilos) - 5/32” paracord diameter - multi-functional across a variety of industries - essential survival and everyday carry tool

Key Features

  • BUILT TO LAST: Meet your almost forever laces, the ASR Outdoor TraversaLace 550 Paracord Survival Laces for Shoes and Hiking Boots; Made in the USA; UV resistant, highly abrasive and made to be used
  • STRONG CONSTRUCTION: The paracord survival laces designed for shoes or hiking boots features a 7-strand nylon interior kern and a nylon exterior mantle or jacket, able to withstand the pressure of up to 550 pounds; the strong interior and exterior material construction make the 550 paracord survival laces reliable, durable and sure to out live any other pair of laces you’re currently using
  • SURVIVAL TOOL ESSENTIAL: These laces are not only a must have for your hiking boots or shoes but should also be an essential item in your survival kit, emergency kit, bug out bag and camping gear as a cross functional tool; the 550 Paracord survival laces, due to their incredible strength, can be taken out of hiking boots and used for everything from building a temporary shelter, bandaging a wound, supporting a splint or unravel to make a fishing line
  • MULTI INDUSTRY BOOT OR SHOE LACES: The ASR Outdoor TraversaLace 550 Paracord Survival Laces are not just for hiking but used by a variety of different industries from police officers, firefighters, and EMTs to construction workers, machine operators and military due to their long toughness and longevity
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Sold as a pair or set of two; Paracord laces made in USA; Metal aglet: 4.2mm; Metal aglet material: copper; Paracord lace diameter: 5/32”; Breaking point: 550 pounds; Available in eight different colors; Available Lengths: 36", 48", 60", 72", 84", 96", 108"

Outside of being both reliable and durable laces for your shoes or hiking boots, the 550 paracord survival laces can double as an invaluable and essential survival tool, emergency preparedness item and everyday carry basic. A must-have in your emergency kit, bug out bag, survival kit or hiking or camping gear, the survival laces are versatile and can be used for a myriad of tasks: assist with temporary shelter construction, gear maintenance and repair, wound bandaging, splint or sling support, unraveled for fishing line or sewing string, strap gear attachment, as a tourniquet to cease bleeding and more when faced with unexpected backwoods emergencies. In short, you can pull your laces taught and then some. For those wilderness adventurers looking for multi-purpose outdoor and survival gear, the 550 paracord survival laces serve just that purpose.

In addition to hiking, camping and the like, the the ASR Outdoor TraversaLace 550 Paracord Survival Laces are not just meant for outdoor enthusiasts but, are used by professionals across a variety of different industries: police officers, firefighters, EMTs, welders, construction workers, machine operators, military, marines and more.

The ASR Outdoor TraversaLace 550 Paracord Survival Laces for Shoes or Hiking Boots are quality constructed and made to last. Not only will the laces outlast your regular laces, they will also prolong the life of your hiking boots or shoes too. Used for their main function as laces for hiking boots, work boots or shoes, while also functioning as an essential survival tool, emergency preparedness item and everyday carry basic, the 550 TraversaLace paracord survival laces are an invaluable and potentially lifesaving tool to have at your disposal.

DISCLAIMER: For best fit, measure your old shoe or boot laces to ensure the ASR Outdoor TraversaLace 550 Paracord Survival Laces will be compatible with your pair of shoes for both diameter and length. The shoe lace aglet is 4.2mm in diameter so, make sure your eyelets are the correct size before ordering. Shoe laces lengths available are listed here and sold as a pair or set of two:

36" - 92cm - 4-5 Eyelets 48" - 122cm - 6-7 Eyelets 60" - 153cm - 7-8 Eyelets 72" - 183cm - 8-9 Eyelets 84" - 213cm - 9-10 Eyelets 96" - 244cm - 10-11 Eyelets 108" - 274cm - 11-12 Eyelets
